title: Pineapple Delight
description: Make pineapples desserts and taste pineapples together !
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a48cc42fb029dc6f4dd2163b218dd395ad4370df.png)

Pineapple Delight is an another addon for [Farmers Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) ! That add pineapple and desserts about pineapple !

Start by finding some wild pineapples and collecting pineapples seedlings, than grow more pineapples !

~~You can feed the dog with pineapples ! And why not do that?~~ 
It is not recommended to give the dog pineapple in reality ...

Let's make desserts and taste pineapples together ! 

**Screenshots**
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b93dba504cc5b9188ef3d08e1cfc181526b83d61.png)
